content: Naive stream watchdogs (fixed silence-timeout or TCP-level checks) false-positive during legitimate quiet periods and restart-loop healthy connections; best practice is app-level heartbeat/ping-pong (30-60s ping, ~10s pong timeout) decoupled from market data cadence, generous timeout (raise infra timeout, detect via absence of heartbeat not absence of data), and log/state-based detection (last-received-message timestamp vs expected cadence) rather than raw silence duration.
